'''gomashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:chainbreaking|chainbreaking]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chainbreaking|chainbreaking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gomashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gomashithi|gomashithi]] || [[word:gomashiji|gomashiji]] || [[word:gomashishi|gomashishi]] || [[word:gomashiki|gomashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gomashuthuthu|gomashuthuthu]] || [[word:gomashujuju|gomashujuju]] || [[word:gomashushushu|gomashushushu]] || [[word:gomashukuku|gomashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gomashuthu|gomashuthu]] || [[word:gomashuju|gomashuju]] || [[word:gomashushu|gomashushu]] || [[word:gomashuku|gomashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gomashufthuf|gomashufthuf]] || [[word:gomashufjuf|gomashufjuf]] || [[word:gomashufshuf|gomashufshuf]] || [[word:gomashufkuf|gomashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gomashethe|gomashethe]] || [[word:gomasheje|gomasheje]] || [[word:gomasheshe|gomasheshe]] || [[word:gomasheke|gomasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gomashothotho|gomashothotho]] || [[word:gomashojojo|gomashojojo]] || [[word:gomashoshosho|gomashoshosho]] || [[word:gomashokoko|gomashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gomashotho|gomashotho]] || [[word:gomashojo|gomashojo]] || [[word:gomashosho|gomashosho]] || [[word:gomashoko|gomashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gomashofthof|gomashofthof]] || [[word:gomashofjof|gomashofjof]] || [[word:gomashofshof|gomashofshof]] || [[word:gomashofkof|gomashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gomashïfthïf|gomashïfthïf]] || [[word:gomashïfjïf|gomashïfjïf]] || [[word:gomashïfshïf|gomashïfshïf]] || [[word:gomashïfkïf|gomashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gomashïfthïfthïf|gomashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:gomashïfjïfjïf|gomashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:gomashïfshïfshïf|gomashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:gomashïfkïfkïf|gomashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gomashïfthïf|gomashïfthïf]] || [[word:gomashïfjïf|gomashïfjïf]] || [[word:gomashïfshïf|gomashïfshïf]] || [[word:gomashïfkïf|gomashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gomashïfthïf|gomashïfthïf]] || [[word:gomashïfjïf|gomashïfjïf]] || [[word:gomashïfshïf|gomashïfshïf]] || [[word:gomashïfkïf|gomashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gomashæthæ|gomashæthæ]] || [[word:gomashæjæ|gomashæjæ]] || [[word:gomashæshæ|gomashæshæ]] || [[word:gomashækæ|gomashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gomashathatha|gomashathatha]] || [[word:gomashajaja|gomashajaja]] || [[word:gomashashasha|gomashashasha]] || [[word:gomashakaka|gomashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gomashatha|gomashatha]] || [[word:gomashaja|gomashaja]] || [[word:gomashasha|gomashasha]] || [[word:gomashaka|gomashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gomashafthaf|gomashafthaf]] || [[word:gomashafjaf|gomashafjaf]] || [[word:gomashafshaf|gomashafshaf]] || [[word:gomashafkaf|gomashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gomashasha|gomashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gomashësha|gomashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomashrosha|gomashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomashmusha|gomashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomashyasha|gomashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogomashnkshësha|gogomashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogomashnkrosha|gogomashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogomashnkmusha|gogomashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogomashnkyasha|gogomashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gomamashasha|gomamashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gomamashësha|gomamashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomamashrosha|gomamashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomamashmusha|gomamashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomamashyasha|gomamashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogomamashnkshësha|gogomamashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogomamashnkrosha|gogomamashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogomamashnkmusha|gogomamashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogomamashnkyasha|gogomamashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gemæshasha|gemæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gemæshësha|gemæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gemæshrosha|gemæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gemæshmusha|gemæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gemæshyasha|gemæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogemæshnkshësha|gogemæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogemæshnkrosha|gogemæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogemæshnkmusha|gogemæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogemæshnkyasha|gogemæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gomfashasha|gomfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gomfashësha|gomfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomfashrosha|gomfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomfashmusha|gomfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomfashyasha|gomfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogomfashnkshësha|gogomfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogomfashnkrosha|gogomfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogomfashnkmusha|gogomfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogomfashnkyasha|gogomfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
